questions.q: What distinction does Pratibha Patil hold among Presidents of India?
questions.explanation: Pratibha Patil was the first woman to hold the office of President of India.

questions.q: Which number President of India was Pratibha Patil?
questions.explanation: She was the twelfth President of India.

questions.q: In which year did Pratibha Patil become President of India?
questions.explanation: She assumed the office of President in 2007.

questions.q: In which year did Pratibha Patil's presidential term end?
questions.explanation: Her term as President ended in 2012.

questions.q: Which constitutional office did Pratibha Patil hold from 2007 to 2012?
questions.explanation: She served as President of India from 2007 to 2012.

questions.q: Of which state was Pratibha Patil the Governor before becoming President?
questions.explanation: She served as Governor of Rajasthan prior to her election as President.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil was the head of state of which country?
questions.explanation: As President of India, she was the country's head of state.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil succeeded which person as President of India?
questions.explanation: She took office in 2007, succeeding A.P.J. Abdul Kalam.

questions.q: What is the normal term of office of the President of India that Pratibha Patil served?
questions.explanation: The President of India is elected for a term of five years.

questions.q: Which gubernatorial post did Pratibha Patil hold immediately before her presidency?
questions.explanation: She was Governor of Rajasthan before being elected President.

questions.q: In which year was Pratibha Patil appointed Governor of Rajasthan?
questions.explanation: She was appointed Governor of Rajasthan in 2004.

questions.q: Which state's politics did Pratibha Patil rise through before her national roles?
questions.explanation: Her early political career was based in Maharashtra.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil was the first woman to hold which of these offices in India?
questions.explanation: She was the first woman President of India.

questions.q: As President, Pratibha Patil was the constitutional head of which branch as supreme commander?
questions.explanation: The President of India is the supreme commander of the armed forces.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil's election as President took place through which body?
questions.explanation: The President is elected by an electoral college of members of Parliament and state legislatures.

questions.q: Which legislative experience did Pratibha Patil have earlier in her career?
options: Member of a state legislature and Parliament
questions.explanation: She served as a legislator at both the state and national levels during her career.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil was the first woman to occupy which residence as President?
questions.explanation: As President she resided at Rashtrapati Bhavan, the President's official residence.

questions.q: During whose presidency did the office at Rashtrapati Bhavan pass from A.P.J. Abdul Kalam in 2007?
questions.explanation: Pratibha Patil succeeded A.P.J. Abdul Kalam as the occupant of Rashtrapati Bhavan in 2007.

questions.q: Which official residence did Pratibha Patil occupy as President?
questions.explanation: Rashtrapati Bhavan is the official residence of the President of India.

questions.q: Who succeeded Pratibha Patil as President of India in 2012?
questions.explanation: Pranab Mukherjee succeeded her as President in 2012.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil's presidency fell within which period?
questions.explanation: Her 2007 to 2012 term spanned the late 2000s into the early 2010s.

questions.q: Under the Constitution, what role did Pratibha Patil hold in relation to Parliament as President?
options: A presiding officer of the Lok Sabha
A presiding officer of the Rajya Sabha
questions.explanation: The Parliament of India consists of the President and the two Houses, so the President is part of Parliament.

questions.q: Before her gubernatorial role, in which decade did Pratibha Patil first enter electoral politics?
questions.explanation: She began her electoral political career in the 1960s in Maharashtra.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil presided over a republic established under which founding document?
questions.explanation: The President of India is the head of state under the Constitution of India.

questions.q: As President, which power relating to convicted persons could Pratibha Patil exercise under the Constitution?
options: The power to try criminal cases
questions.explanation: Under Article 72, the President holds the power to grant pardons, reprieves and remissions.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil's term as Governor of Rajasthan immediately preceded her election to which office?
questions.explanation: She moved from Governor of Rajasthan to President of India in 2007.

questions.q: Which constitutional article governs the election of the President, the office Pratibha Patil held?
questions.explanation: Article 54 provides for the election of the President of India by an electoral college.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil was the first woman President; who was the first woman Prime Minister of India?
questions.explanation: Indira Gandhi was India's first and only woman Prime Minister, a distinct office from the presidency Patil held.

questions.q: Pratibha Patil's gubernatorial appointment to Rajasthan was made under whose authority, as per the Constitution?
questions.explanation: Governors of states are appointed by the President of India under Article 155.

questions.q: In the sequence of Indian Presidents, Pratibha Patil's twelfth presidency was immediately followed by which numbered President?
questions.explanation: She was the twelfth President and was succeeded by the thirteenth President, Pranab Mukherjee.
